content: Autonomous curiosity-driven agents (from Topic A) can be framed as the active learners that dynamically prune and prioritize their own memory storage to hit 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory benchmarks, with intrinsic curiosity acting as the built-in acquisition function for selecting which new experiences to retain. This replaces the common external annotation selection paradigm in active learning with an intrinsic, agent-governed memory curation process.
